{step}. BOOKS & PAPERS ({count} items):: {step}. BOOKS & PAPERS ({count} items): Stack books neatly, file loose papers, and digitize important documents.
{step}. CLOTHING ({count} items): Sort b: {step}. CLOTHING ({count} items): Sort by type, fold or hang, and consider donating items not worn recently.
{step}. ELECTRONICS ({count} items): Cre: {step}. ELECTRONICS ({count} items): Create a charging station, bundle cables with ties, and label chargers.
{step}. KITCHEN ITEMS ({count} items): G: {step}. KITCHEN ITEMS ({count} items): Group similar items, stack plates and bowls, and use drawer dividers for utensils.
{step}. MISCELLANEOUS ({count} items): F: {step}. MISCELLANEOUS ({count} items): Find a designated home for each item and group similar things together.
